title: Reformation Floral Midi Wrap Dress

specs.fit: wrap silhouette with adjustable tie waist
specs.length: midi length, hits below the knee

reviews: Absolutely gorgeous fabric that drapes beautifully on any body type.
Runs slightly large, I recommend sizing down for a more fitted look.
Perfect for summer weddings and outdoor brunches.
The wrap silhouette is incredibly flattering and comfortable.

title: Everlane The Japanese GoWeave Tank
reviews: The weave on this tank is so refined, looks much more expensive than it is.
Great for layering under blazers at work.
Fabric does not wrinkle even after a full day of wear.
Fits true to size and the length is perfect for tucking.

title: Madewell High-Rise Skinny Jeans

specs.fit: high-rise skinny through hip and thigh

reviews: Best jeans I have ever owned, the stretch is perfect without losing shape.
High rise stays in place without digging into the waist.
These hold their shape even after multiple washes.
Runs a bit snug in the thighs, consider sizing up one.

title: Patagonia Better Sweater Fleece Jacket
reviews: Incredibly warm and cozy for cool fall mornings.
Love the sustainable materials and fair trade certification.
Fits true to size with room for layering underneath.
The sage color is even more beautiful in person.
Pockets are deep and functional, perfect for hiking.

title: Free People Intimately Seamless Bodysuit
reviews: So comfortable I forget I am wearing it.
The seamless construction is perfect under sheer tops.
Runs small, definitely size up for comfort.

title: J.Crew Classic-Fit Cotton Poplin Shirt
reviews: Crisp and professional, perfect for the office.
The cotton quality is outstanding, holds up after many washes.
Slightly boxy fit which I personally love for a relaxed look.
Great white shirt that does not become see-through.

title: Anthropologie Pilcro Relaxed Linen Pants
reviews: The linen is soft from the first wear, no breaking in needed.
Incredibly breathable for hot summer days.
The relaxed fit is trendy but still polished enough for work.
Wrinkles are part of the linen charm but these resist more than most.

title: Zara Oversized Blazer with Pockets
reviews: Instantly elevates any outfit from casual to polished.
The oversized cut is on trend and very comfortable.
Pocket placement is functional and flattering.
Lining quality is average but acceptable at this price point.

title: Lululemon Align High-Rise Pant
reviews: Buttery soft fabric that feels like a second skin.
These are hands down the most comfortable leggings I own.
High waist stays in place during yoga and running.
Fabric pills slightly after heavy use but still worth it.
True to size with excellent compression.

title: Everlane The Cashmere Crew

specs.care: hand wash or dry clean recommended

reviews: Luxuriously soft cashmere at a reasonable price.
The navy color is rich and does not fade after washing.
Fits relaxed but not oversized, exactly what I wanted.
Minor pilling after several wears but easily removed.

title: Reformation Juliette Sleeveless Top
reviews: The blush color is subtle and elegant for any occasion.
Lightweight and perfect for layering in transitional weather.
Runs true to size with a flattering neckline.

title: Madewell Central Shirt in Stripe
reviews: Classic striped pattern that goes with everything.
Soft cotton fabric that gets softer with every wash.
The relaxed fit is perfect for weekend casual wear.
Buttons stay secure and the collar lays nicely.

title: H&M Wide-Leg Linen Trousers
reviews: Amazing quality for the price point.
Wide leg silhouette is very flattering and comfortable.
The beige color is versatile and pairs well with everything.
Runs slightly long, may need hemming for petite frames.

title: Free People Dolman Quilted Jacket
reviews: The quilted pattern is unique and eye-catching.
Lightweight but surprisingly warm for fall weather.
The dolman sleeves give a relaxed bohemian vibe.
Rust color is stunning and gets many compliments.

title: J.Crew Pleated A-Line Midi Skirt

specs.waist: sits at natural waist with side zip

reviews: The pleats add beautiful movement when walking.
Sits perfectly at the waist without slipping down.
The burgundy shade is deep and rich, perfect for fall.
Versatile enough for work and weekend outings.

title: Zara Ribbed Knit Midi Dress
reviews: Hugs curves in all the right places.
Incredibly affordable for such a polished look.
The ribbed texture adds visual interest to a simple silhouette.
Comfortable enough for all-day wear.

title: Patagonia Nano Puff Insulated Jacket
reviews: Packs down incredibly small for travel.
Keeps me warm in surprisingly cold conditions.
Love that it uses recycled materials throughout.
The navy color is classic and never goes out of style.
Zipper quality is excellent and runs smooth.

title: Anthropologie Maeve Flounce Dress
reviews: The floral print is whimsical and truly unique.
Flounce hem adds playful movement to every step.
Fits true to size with a comfortable elasticized waist.
Received so many compliments wearing this to a garden party.

title: Lululemon Define Jacket
reviews: The tailored fit makes this great for both gym and errands.
Thumb holes keep sleeves in place during workouts.
Dark olive is a beautiful neutral alternative to black.
Stretchy fabric moves with every motion without restriction.

title: Everlane The Way-High Drape Pant
reviews: The drape on these pants is absolutely stunning.
High waist is flattering and stays in place all day.
Easy to dress up with heels or down with sneakers.
Fabric is lightweight but not sheer at all.
True to size with a comfortable straight leg.
